CustomField.description: "IF(CountSubString(ToUpper(OSS_Configured),""COMPLETE"")>0 & CountSubString(ToUpper(AL_Configured),""COMPLETE"")>0 & Visit_Website_?_Scheduler_App==""WORKING WELL"" & DMS_Reviewed==""NO CONCERNS"" & Verify_DMS_IDs==""WORKING WELL"" & Factory_Pricing==""COMPLETED"" & Dealer_Pricing==""COMPLETED"" & Concerns_Pricing==""COMPLETED"" & Triage_Pricing==""COMPLETED"" & MVP_Pricing==""COMPLETED"", ""Complete"",""Incomplete"")"
CustomField.label: DFX Pre-Visit Checklist Status
